{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021138CBE442D79039AEFA17F8"}"},"total":5966},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7466426767336375064","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错，虽然车很遗憾得被“车”掉了一部分，但是剧情还是蛮有趣的。而且逻辑硬伤比较少，这一点在番茄的小说里算是比较能提升阅读体验的特点了。而且不知是不是因为是女作者的原因，对女性的细节描写更加细腻，看着更顺滑一些。而且虽说没到考据严密的地步，但是对于时代背景下的社会风貌的考究还是有的，不会让人有割裂感。
  值得注意的是，这本书目前没看到啥强行吃瘪的剧情，体验比较流畅。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738415199,"group_id":"7230072764088978487","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不看私信，感兴趣的话可在评论区见。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyEyi2I+MmHDVs/Ujk6kcFXBfDLdru4oj6f8h3HkYWVA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1041955078547981","user_name":"爱吃红烧香菇鸡的玄王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1041955078547981","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705912794,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7230072764088978487","book_info":{"abstract":"【西幻+多女主+诡异+克苏鲁+精灵+胎穿】
那隐藏在文明世界之下的阴暗扭曲，以及只在深夜里响起的诡异呢喃！
当海上迷雾升起的那天，世界就变成了一座孤岛。

      一开始只是以为重生到了一个科技落后的时代，手机，电脑，WiFi啥也没有。
      不过好在自己长的“亿”表人才，性格也凭“亿”近人，倒是不用像以前那样过着996的生活。
   就这样吧，安啦安啦，直到某一天，慈祥的老父附在他耳边轻轻跟他说出了这个世界的真相。
   “什么！那些教廷供奉的神灵真实存在？
    “什么！我们家居然是异端？被抓到了就要被吊在绞刑架上烧死的那种？”
      他整个人都不好了，哆哆嗦嗦的说：“我能把你们都逐出家族吗？”
     慈祥的老父亲手掌摩挲着腰间的皮带，面容变得愈发慈祥。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3bc560c9114c0f33e01cb2eb64034a17","author":"予桃i","author_id":"","book_id":"7230072764088978487","book_name":"转生大贵族，异世界放纵日记","book_short_name":"超脱计划！","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"16万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7243362712770740740","read_count":"159824","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3353239"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1575","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻仙侠,奇幻,玄幻,穿越,多女主,架空,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5868b0c1fb8008c075c3ea989333bca0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387098&x-signature=USEAuKc5TMpaS1NrpE8fbgKfHAs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3444122503090583","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"215"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021138CBE442D79039AEFA17F8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28966,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":71926},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449413269729870616","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本十分纯洁又引人注目的书，书中讲述了男主和姐姐，小姨，妹妹之间的浓浓亲情还有和48名女同学之间的纯洁友谊。
      此书语言精炼，细节描述幽深而有内涵，需要大家多多领悟，细细揣摩。能讲出来的，只是故事，而真正的灵魂与精髓，都在不言之中。在阅读时，应该脑补各种动作与姿势，丰富不可言说的画面，幻听虫鸟的轻吟，控住手指的起伏。
      此书妙极，值得细细品味。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734457775,"group_id":"7230072764088978487","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny4IdqYZfSRaO4nPOI8/Wv6Z2fGeORBlMpmRegKbujTC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0d7adcc71928421c8db508d5df3fc06e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795941&x-signature=zBYvJGEHr2hlG5%2Bl1eYkcb7RTVM%3D","user_id":"1135137097002848","user_name":"ikun65"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1135137097002848","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":0,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7230072764088978487","book_info":{"abstract":"【西幻+多女主+诡异+克苏鲁+精灵+胎穿】
